item.title: The Idiots of Imgur: A Double Dump pt 216
item.description: Why the double dump, you ask? I’m going on vacation to Japan for the next couple weeks and I’m not going to kid myself into thinking that I’ll remember to post. Feel free to keep tagging me anytime, just know it might take me even longer than usual to get back to everyone. Hope you all have a great weekend and I’ll see you for the next mini dump later this month!
item.dc:creator: UncleSlam123

item.title: Down to earth wise words
item.description: Edit: wow! This went viral! Right now, though, there are 23 people, Or one butt-hurt MAGAt with 23 accounts, that George's words hit too close to home.

item.title: The 515th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 5
item.description:
▲ This is what Bi Erasure is. ▲ It's not Biphobia. ▲ (As a Bisexual who is attracted more to women than to men, I'm often told that specifying that is "Bi-Erasure". It's not, it's being specific. I'm still Bi.) As someone who has respect for the few rules of the English language that do exist, I absolutely despise when people call bigotry against a group of people a "phobia". It's not a phobia, it's hate. Calling it a phobia makes it sound like a medical/clinical issue when it isn't. It's an educational/moral issue. -misia or -mesia are the correct suffixes Homomisia, Transmisia, Bimisia.
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk.
Venus
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.description: June is National Men's Health Awareness Month "People don't fake depression; they fake being okay." - Robin Williams. This powerful quote highlights the silent struggle many face behind their smiles. It reminds us to be kind and compassionate because even the happiest-looking individuals might be fighting unseen battles. Let's support mental health awareness and remind each other: it's okay to not be okay.... https://www.bbc.com/news/entertainment-arts-28753326
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: Movie Memes Vol 2
item.description: I'm picking back up where I left off clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. Hope you all enjoyed, as always I'll post the links to my previous posts by category below for anyone who's interested. Star Wars Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/SVzbsKr Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/agPBjZY Part 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/3WbYPiO Part 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/D3xLtoh Part 5: https://imgur.com/gallery/hOagKbC Lord of the Rings https://imgur.com/gallery/YrdND58 Marvel https://imgur.com/gallery/J243dDD Harry Potter https://imgur.com/gallery/FCOoDNo Disney https://imgur.com/gallery/VFswkF4 Anime https://imgur.com/gallery/4oTHG6o Gaming Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/tgBY85X Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/dQN08Rs Part 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/uZJkc2E Part 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/zo8IFb1 Musical Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/JiwKewf Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/t16zecY Animals Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/P0cGACu Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/2ohYMNV Part 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/9i0lkoD Part 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/0wD3uKa Workplace Memes Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/8DXcQeO Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/POhPf2K Cartoon Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/8zdPMGx Movie Memes: https://imgur.com/gallery/16yzhY0
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 506

1

20

22
23
24
25
Man Tax: Bruce Herbelin “The first draft of anything is shit.” ― Ernest Hemingway I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go and find something that you do like. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.title: What Happened Today #127
item.description: We all had our phones out, refreshing for Trump-Musk reconciliation updates. Would they talk? Were aides scheduling calls? What about the Tesla? While we watched that soap opera, they were in back rooms rushing Supreme Court filings, planning immigration raids, and signing contracts. The grinding machinery of dismantling never paused. Now Trump's at Bedminster for the weekend, probably laughing at how easy it is to distract us while they demolish our country. Stay the course. Raise hell as you resist, and don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/china-talks-london 2. https://go.govbrief.today/job-growth-slows 3. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-doge-social-security 4. https://go.govbrief.today/palantir-disease-data 5. https://go.govbrief.today/duffy-fuel-economy-standards 6. https://go.govbrief.today/epa-end-emissions-reporting 7. https://go.govbrief.today/gop-rep-xenophobic 8. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-investigation-obstruction 9. https://go.govbrief.today/va-staff-problems 10. https://go.govbrief.today/proud-boys-sue 11. https://go.govbrief.today/la-immigration-raids 12. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-ga-detention-center 13. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fire-ed-employees 14. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-allows-library-museum 15. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-order-drones 16. https://go.govbrief.today/omb-ignore-gao 17. https://go.govbrief.today/wh-can-block-ap 18. https://go.govbrief.today/broadband-equity-changed 19. https://go.govbrief.today/chinese-exec-crypto-dinner 20. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-musk-fallout Yesterday's Story - https://go.govbrief.today/no-kings-map Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/dems-cite-vance-precendent Subscribe (Free & Private) - https://govbrief.today P.S. Yes, I know I have to fix the intensity score container. I was too tired to login to the server tonight. I'll do it tomorrow.™
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Trans memes on a special day
item.description:
Happy Pride Month everyone!
Enjoy this small selection of my favorite trans (or trans-adjacent) memes
Today is special for me because it marks 2.5 years since I started HRT
Wish they would stop using the same 3 detransitioners as an excuse to take healthcare away from the 99+% of us who would never go back
Wish it was this easy
I was raised in a super conservative religious family, and it’s sad most of them would prefer me as a miserable dude than a happy woman.
Gender affirming care is life saving. I was so close to ending things before I transitioned, but that’s a story for another day
I love that these three said trans rights. Especially love that Daniel called out JKR specifically
I just really enjoyed watching him go off after people complained about him putting pronouns in his bio
He did not hold back
And a nice finishing touch
Gianmarco Soresi is my favorite comedian. He’s hilarious and he’s also a huge ally!
I love stories like this!
So cute!
I love Twin Peaks, and I especially love this scene. RIP David Lynch
Let me show you an example
Left is me before my first dose of E (and also like the 3rd selfie I ever took because I HATED seeing myself in pics), right is me today, 2.5 years of estrogen magic later. I just took this after getting home from a 10 hour shift at work, so it’s not my best pic, but I actually have life in my eyes! I don’t look dead inside! Still planning on FFS to touch up a few rough places (dysphoria SUCKS lol) but for now it’s nice to be able to look in a mirror and actually like what I see. To all my trans siblings, I love you. To all trans allies, thank you! To everyone else, take some advice from David Lynch: fix your hearts or die.
item.dc:creator: CaptKirksNipples

item.title: A Guy Thing
item.description: One cool dad.....
item.dc:creator: MissDeeMeanor

item.title: Memes and things vol 154
item.description:
I honestly don’t mind these types of names. It’s the people that put 27 apostrophes or add periods in a child’s name that infuriate me. When I worked in a daycare over 13 years ago, I had a kid with 5 apostrophes in his name and another kid named (and I am not kidding) will.i.am. spelled just like that but pronounced William. If we uppercased it or took out the periods, the dad ripped us everytime telling us that his kid is not “basic” and we need to respect his spelling.
Hehehehe butt plug.
More like my feet. They are always cold.
I say “yes chef” to my partner when we cook together or build IKEA furniture
Red and really saturated blues. They hurt my eyes, especially if the two colors are next to each other.
I don’t have a favorite genre or band. I just like music and if I like the song, the lyrics, the instruments, whatever, I save it to my favorites. Literally have the Giga Pudding song on my list and GooGoo GaGa from a 1990s sing along tape called Baby Songs even though it’s not sung by babies or children.
If you do dishes at the family gathering, you get to listen to all the hot tea while avoiding the spillers.
Nubbin tax!!
item.dc:creator: razalude

item.title: Memes I found on the bottom shelf.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
This one is not a meme as much as a PSA I would have felt guilty about not sharing with you guys after having seen it myself.
My coworker sent me (Heather) this. Not everyone calls me Bottom believe it or not. I also like that this meme implies there's a Heathest
Something something twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Pride Month ?️‍⚧️
item.description:
I grew these myself with pizza and spironolactone
Rise for the flag. Now..... I'm not asking
Bert and Ernie from the 1987 a muppet family Christmas which features Bert is Mama and Ernie as Papa in a rehearsal of Clemoth Moore's Twas the Night Before Christmas. Originally they were intended to be background characters from It's a Wonderful Life Bert is the police officer and Ernie is the cab driver and they live together gay and clearly in love they bicker but they show us that they don't have to use violence to resolve their problems
Yeah so that's what's going on
Bart is in the local gays show their pride headline for Springfield but Milhouse is the one the psychologist thinks is gay and probably is Milhouse does like they'll dress up like ladies The Simpsons writers are absolute cowards for not having Barton middle House end up together in the future it's it's absolute dog s*** homophobia Milhouse with Lisa that's that's ridiculous that's absurd I don't buy it for a second
Quite accurate actually
Fred from Scooby-Doo sees that ass
I like big women I am big women
I don't know who I stole this from but I totally stole this from somebody
The Dragon shield Black Ranger and I'm very glad that they gave him that title and those words in that exact order and in no other order
I don't know I'm trying my best you guys
For some reason this to me screams gay pride Captain America about to f****** give the craziest high five to Space Ghost
I drew these myself
I had to like sit there and sketch this for a few hours
Jesus loves to watch
It's Riley Black's chatty little cat I'm pretty sure it's a delightful little monster
It's me I'm doing my best I don't know what you guys want
item.dc:creator: JessicaStrong

item.title: Same gams 3 years later...
item.description: I'm on a weight loss journey. 77lbs down from 285 in December. I love jamming out to music while working out at the gym 4-5 times a week. I could use some playlist recommendations. Any genre as long as it's upbeat to get my heart pumping!
item.dc:creator: Sugarbritches21
